name: Bestial Mutagen (Greater)
description:
Activate A (manipulate)

Your features transform into something bestial and lumbering.

Benefit You gain a +3 item bonus to Athletics checks and unarmed attack rolls. You gain a claw unarmed attack (3d8 slashing damage) with the agile trait and a jaws unarmed attack (3d10 piercing damage). runes don't modify the damage caused by these attacks.

Drawback You take a -2 penalty to Reflex saves, Acrobatics checks, and Stealth Checks.

Duration 1 hour.
